active_profile_source: S00 claim scope plus S01/S03 evidence/contribution materials

checks: allowed wording and forbidden wording are concrete
citation/evidence/figure burden is positive not only prohibitive

downstream_design_force: S10 can develop claims deeply without strengthening them
S13/rendered gate can trace claim/evidence failures

failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: claim is safe but lacks positive citation/evidence/visual burden
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local trace, label, or wording defect that does not alter authority
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential reviewer risk tracked without forced full rerun

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S04 for claim support/wording/citation burden defects
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings enter local revision or risk ledger; they do not force full downstream rerun by default.
